# Feature / System PR

## What was built?
Describe the feature in one sentence.

## Vertical Slice Checklist

### UI
- [ ] Page or component exists
- [ ] Navigation entry added
- [ ] Visible in platform UI

### Functionality
- [ ] User can perform primary action
- [ ] State updates correctly
- [ ] Result is visible

### Data + API
- [ ] API connected to UI
- [ ] Data persists correctly
- [ ] Error handling works

### UX
- [ ] Empty state implemented
- [ ] Loading state implemented
- [ ] Error state implemented

## Owner Visibility Test
Can an `OWNER` log in and clearly see and use this?

- [ ] YES
- [ ] NO

## Anti-Patterns Check
- [ ] No backend-only changes
- [ ] No hidden routes
- [ ] No placeholder pages
- [ ] No "UI later" logic

## Screenshots
Attach screenshots or a screen recording.

2.
3.

## Final Confirmation
- [ ] This feature is visible
- [ ] This feature is usable
- [ ] This feature is complete as a vertical slice
